description: This domain provides various functionality related to drawing atop the inspected page.

types.description: Configuration data for drawing the source order of an elements children.

properties.name: parentOutlineColor
properties.description: the color to outline the given element in.

properties.name: childOutlineColor
properties.description: the color to outline the child elements in.

types.description: Configuration data for the highlighting of Grid elements.

properties.name: showGridExtensionLines
properties.description: Whether the extension lines from grid cells to the rulers should be shown (default: false).

properties.name: showPositiveLineNumbers
properties.description: Show Positive line number labels (default: false).

properties.name: showNegativeLineNumbers
properties.description: Show Negative line number labels (default: false).

properties.name: showAreaNames
properties.description: Show area name labels (default: false).

properties.name: showLineNames
properties.description: Show line name labels (default: false).

properties.name: showTrackSizes
properties.description: Show track size labels (default: false).

properties.name: gridBorderColor
properties.description: The grid container border highlight color (default: transparent).

properties.name: cellBorderColor
properties.description: The cell border color (default: transparent). Deprecated, please use rowLineColor and columnLineColor instead.

properties.name: rowLineColor
properties.description: The row line color (default: transparent).

properties.name: columnLineColor
properties.description: The column line color (default: transparent).

properties.name: gridBorderDash
properties.description: Whether the grid border is dashed (default: false).

properties.name: cellBorderDash
properties.description: Whether the cell border is dashed (default: false). Deprecated, please us rowLineDash and columnLineDash instead.

properties.name: rowLineDash
properties.description: Whether row lines are dashed (default: false).

properties.name: columnLineDash
properties.description: Whether column lines are dashed (default: false).

properties.name: rowGapColor
properties.description: The row gap highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: rowHatchColor
properties.description: The row gap hatching fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: columnGapColor
properties.description: The column gap highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: columnHatchColor
properties.description: The column gap hatching fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: areaBorderColor
properties.description: The named grid areas border color (Default: transparent).

properties.name: gridBackgroundColor
properties.description: The grid container background color (Default: transparent).

types.description: Configuration data for the highlighting of Flex container elements.

properties.name: containerBorder
properties.description: The style of the container border

properties.name: lineSeparator
properties.description: The style of the separator between lines

properties.name: itemSeparator
properties.description: The style of the separator between items

properties.name: mainDistributedSpace
properties.description: Style of content-distribution space on the main axis (justify-content).

properties.name: crossDistributedSpace
properties.description: Style of content-distribution space on the cross axis (align-content).

properties.name: rowGapSpace
properties.description: Style of empty space caused by row gaps (gap/row-gap).

properties.name: columnGapSpace
properties.description: Style of empty space caused by columns gaps (gap/column-gap).

properties.name: crossAlignment
properties.description: Style of the self-alignment line (align-items).

types.description: Configuration data for the highlighting of Flex item elements.

properties.name: baseSizeBox
properties.description: Style of the box representing the item's base size

properties.name: baseSizeBorder
properties.description: Style of the border around the box representing the item's base size

properties.name: flexibilityArrow
properties.description: Style of the arrow representing if the item grew or shrank

types.description: Style information for drawing a line.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of the line (default: transparent)

properties.name: pattern
properties.description: The line pattern (default: solid)

types.description: Style information for drawing a box.

properties.name: fillColor
properties.description: The background color for the box (default: transparent)

properties.name: hatchColor
properties.description: The hatching color for the box (default: transparent)

types.description: Configuration data for the highlighting of page elements.

properties.name: showInfo
properties.description: Whether the node info tooltip should be shown (default: false).

properties.name: showStyles
properties.description: Whether the node styles in the tooltip (default: false).

properties.name: showRulers
properties.description: Whether the rulers should be shown (default: false).

properties.name: showAccessibilityInfo
properties.description: Whether the a11y info should be shown (default: true).

properties.name: showExtensionLines
properties.description: Whether the extension lines from node to the rulers should be shown (default: false).

properties.name: contentColor
properties.description: The content box highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: paddingColor
properties.description: The padding highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: borderColor
properties.description: The border highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: marginColor
properties.description: The margin highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: eventTargetColor
properties.description: The event target element highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: shapeColor
properties.description: The shape outside fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: shapeMarginColor
properties.description: The shape margin fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: cssGridColor
properties.description: The grid layout color (default: transparent).

properties.name: colorFormat
properties.description: The color format used to format color styles (default: hex).

properties.name: gridHighlightConfig
properties.description: The grid layout highlight configuration (default: all transparent).

properties.name: flexContainerHighlightConfig
properties.description: The flex container highlight configuration (default: all transparent).

properties.name: flexItemHighlightConfig
properties.description: The flex item highlight configuration (default: all transparent).

properties.name: contrastAlgorithm
properties.description: The contrast algorithm to use for the contrast ratio (default: aa).

properties.name: containerQueryContainerHighlightConfig
properties.description: The container query container highlight configuration (default: all transparent).

properties.name: gridHighlightConfig
properties.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

properties.name: flexContainerHighlightConfig
properties.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance of flex containers.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

properties.name: snapportBorder
properties.description: The style of the snapport border (default: transparent)

properties.name: snapAreaBorder
properties.description: The style of the snap area border (default: transparent)

properties.name: scrollMarginColor
properties.description: The margin highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: scrollPaddingColor
properties.description: The padding highlight fill color (default: transparent).

properties.name: scrollSnapContainerHighlightConfig
properties.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance of scroll snap containers.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

properties.name: rect
properties.description: A rectangle represent hinge

properties.name: contentColor
properties.description: The content box highlight fill color (default: a dark color).

properties.name: outlineColor
properties.description: The content box highlight outline color (default: transparent).

properties.name: showCSS
properties.description: Whether the title bar CSS should be shown when emulating the Window Controls Overlay.

properties.name: selectedPlatform
properties.description: Selected platforms to show the overlay.

properties.name: themeColor
properties.description: The theme color defined in app manifest.

properties.name: containerQueryContainerHighlightConfig
properties.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance of container query containers.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the container node to highlight.

properties.name: containerBorder
properties.description: The style of the container border.

properties.name: descendantBorder
properties.description: The style of the descendants' borders.

properties.name: isolationModeHighlightConfig
properties.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance of an element in isolation mode.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the isolated element to highlight.

properties.name: resizerColor
properties.description: The fill color of the resizers (default: transparent).

properties.name: resizerHandleColor
properties.description: The fill color for resizer handles (default: transparent).

properties.name: maskColor
properties.description: The fill color for the mask covering non-isolated elements (default: transparent).

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

properties.name: backendNodeId
properties.description: Identifier of the backend node to highlight.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables domain notifications.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables domain notifications.

commands.name: getHighlightObjectForTest
commands.description: For testing.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to get highlight object for.

parameters.name: includeDistance
parameters.description: Whether to include distance info.

parameters.name: includeStyle
parameters.description: Whether to include style info.

parameters.name: colorFormat
parameters.description: The color format to get config with (default: hex).

parameters.name: showAccessibilityInfo
parameters.description: Whether to show accessibility info (default: true).

commands.name: getGridHighlightObjectsForTest
commands.description: For Persistent Grid testing.

parameters.name: nodeIds
parameters.description: Ids of the node to get highlight object for.

returns.name: highlights
returns.description: Grid Highlight data for the node ids provided.

commands.name: getSourceOrderHighlightObjectForTest
commands.description: For Source Order Viewer testing.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to highlight.

returns.name: highlight
returns.description: Source order highlight data for the node id provided.

commands.name: hideHighlight
commands.description: Hides any highlight.

commands.name: highlightFrame
commands.description:
Highlights owner element of the frame with given id.
Deprecated: Doesn't work reliably and cannot be fixed due to process
separation (the owner node might be in a different process). Determine
the owner node in the client and use highlightNode.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifier of the frame to highlight.

parameters.name: contentColor
parameters.description: The content box highlight fill color (default: transparent).

parameters.name: contentOutlineColor
parameters.description: The content box highlight outline color (default: transparent).

commands.name: highlightNode
commands.description:
Highlights DOM node with given id or with the given JavaScript object wrapper. Either nodeId or
objectId must be specified.

parameters.name: highlightConfig
parameters.description: A descriptor for the highlight appearance.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to highlight.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node to be highlighted.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: Selectors to highlight relevant nodes.

commands.name: highlightQuad
commands.description: Highlights given quad. Coordinates are absolute with respect to the main frame viewport.

parameters.name: quad
parameters.description: Quad to highlight

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: The highlight fill color (default: transparent).

parameters.name: outlineColor
parameters.description: The highlight outline color (default: transparent).

commands.name: highlightRect
commands.description:
Highlights given rectangle. Coordinates are absolute with respect to the main frame viewport.
Issue: the method does not handle device pixel ratio (DPR) correctly.
The coordinates currently have to be adjusted by the client
if DPR is not 1 (see crbug.com/437807128).

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Rectangle width

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Rectangle height

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: The highlight fill color (default: transparent).

parameters.name: outlineColor
parameters.description: The highlight outline color (default: transparent).

commands.name: highlightSourceOrder
commands.description:
Highlights the source order of the children of the DOM node with given id or with the given
JavaScript object wrapper. Either nodeId or objectId must be specified.

parameters.name: sourceOrderConfig
parameters.description: A descriptor for the appearance of the overlay drawing.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to highlight.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to highlight.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node to be highlighted.

commands.name: setInspectMode
commands.description:
Enters the 'inspect' mode. In this mode, elements that user is hovering over are highlighted.
Backend then generates 'inspectNodeRequested' event upon element selection.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Set an inspection mode.

parameters.name: highlightConfig
parameters.description:
A descriptor for the highlight appearance of hovered-over nodes. May be omitted if `enabled
== false`.

commands.name: setShowAdHighlights
commands.description: Highlights owner element of all frames detected to be ads.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: True for showing ad highlights

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message to display, also triggers resume and step over controls.

commands.name: setShowDebugBorders
commands.description: Requests that backend shows debug borders on layers

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: True for showing debug borders

commands.name: setShowFPSCounter
commands.description: Requests that backend shows the FPS counter

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: True for showing the FPS counter

commands.name: setShowGridOverlays
commands.description: Highlight multiple elements with the CSS Grid overlay.

parameters.name: gridNodeHighlightConfigs
parameters.description: An array of node identifiers and descriptors for the highlight appearance.

parameters.name: flexNodeHighlightConfigs
parameters.description: An array of node identifiers and descriptors for the highlight appearance.

parameters.name: scrollSnapHighlightConfigs
parameters.description: An array of node identifiers and descriptors for the highlight appearance.

parameters.name: containerQueryHighlightConfigs
parameters.description: An array of node identifiers and descriptors for the highlight appearance.

parameters.name: inspectedElementAnchorConfig
parameters.description: Node identifier for which to show an anchor for.

commands.name: setShowPaintRects
commands.description: Requests that backend shows paint rectangles

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: True for showing paint rectangles

commands.name: setShowLayoutShiftRegions
commands.description: Requests that backend shows layout shift regions

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: True for showing layout shift regions

commands.name: setShowScrollBottleneckRects
commands.description: Requests that backend shows scroll bottleneck rects

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: True for showing scroll bottleneck rects

commands.name: setShowHitTestBorders
commands.description: Deprecated, no longer has any effect.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: True for showing hit-test borders

commands.name: setShowWebVitals
commands.description: Deprecated, no longer has any effect.

commands.name: setShowViewportSizeOnResize
commands.description: Paints viewport size upon main frame resize.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: Whether to paint size or not.

commands.name: setShowHinge
commands.description: Add a dual screen device hinge

parameters.name: hingeConfig
parameters.description: hinge data, null means hideHinge

commands.name: setShowIsolatedElements
commands.description: Show elements in isolation mode with overlays.

parameters.name: isolatedElementHighlightConfigs
parameters.description: An array of node identifiers and descriptors for the highlight appearance.

commands.name: setShowWindowControlsOverlay
commands.description: Show Window Controls Overlay for PWA

parameters.name: windowControlsOverlayConfig
parameters.description: Window Controls Overlay data, null means hide Window Controls Overlay

events.name: inspectNodeRequested
events.description:
Fired when the node should be inspected. This happens after call to `setInspectMode` or when
user manually inspects an element.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to inspect.

events.name: nodeHighlightRequested
events.description: Fired when the node should be highlighted. This happens after call to `setInspectMode`.

events.name: screenshotRequested
events.description: Fired when user asks to capture screenshot of some area on the page.

parameters.name: viewport
parameters.description: Viewport to capture, in device independent pixels (dip).

events.name: inspectPanelShowRequested
events.description: Fired when user asks to show the Inspect panel.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to show in the panel.

events.name: inspectedElementWindowRestored
events.description: Fired when user asks to restore the Inspected Element floating window.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to restore the floating window for.

events.name: inspectModeCanceled
events.description: Fired when user cancels the inspect mode.
